basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online Research Assistant and Field Investigators Posts
basic_details.short_information: Allahabad University is recruiting Research Staff for the ICSSR Major Research Project.

qualification.details: Research Assistant | Essential: Post Graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Proficiency in MS Excel and SPSS is desired. | Field Investigators | Essential: Post Graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. Knowledge of research topic and geographical region with willingness to travel extensively.

how_to_apply: Applications in the attached format along with:
Self-attested copies of mark sheets & certificates
Should reach Dr. Alok Agrawal, Project Director, by 03 August 2026 via Registered/Speed Post or Google Form: https://forms.gle/prbawwWi3uFrntA18
Address: Dr. Alok Agrawal Department of Commerce & Business Administration Allahabad University , Prayagraj - 211002
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary. No TA/DA for interview. Original documents must be produced at interview. Decision of Selection Committee is final.

content_sections.text: Allahabad University Research Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Allahabad University is recruiting Research Staff for the ICSSR Major Research Project.

rows.allahabad_university: An Assessment of the ODOP Scheme and Role of Digital Entrepreneurship in Sustainable Enterprise Development in Uttar Pradesh

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant Essential: Post Graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Proficiency in MS Excel and SPSS is desired. Field Investigators Essential: Post Graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks. Knowledge of research topic and geographical region with willingness to travel extensively.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Allahabad University Research Staff 2026
content_sections.text: Applications in the attached format along with: CV Self-attested copies of mark sheets & certificates Details of research/other relevant experience Should reach Dr. Alok Agrawal, Project Director, by 03 August 2026 via Registered/Speed Post or Google Form: https://forms.gle/prbawwWi3uFrntA18 Address: Dr. Alok Agrawal Department of Commerce & Business Administration Allahabad University , Prayagraj - 211002

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary. No TA/DA for interview. Original documents must be produced at interview. Decision of Selection Committee is final.

content_sections.heading: Allahabad University Research Assistant and Field Investigators Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for University of Allahabad Research Staff 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many positions are available in University of Allahabad ICSSR Project?
faq.answer: Total 04 positions (02 Research Assistant + 02 Field Investigators).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Research Assistant at University of Allahabad?
faq.answer: ₹37,000 per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for Research Assistant in ODOP Scheme Project?
faq.answer: Post Graduate in Social Science (55% min) with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and proficiency in SPSS/Excel.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for University of Allahabad Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: Send application with CV and documents to Dr. Alok Agrawal or submit via Google Form by 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: 9 months (Field Investigators: 5 months).

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Field Investigator at University of Allahabad?
faq.answer: ₹20,000 per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q8. Is travel required for Field Investigators in Allahabad Project?
faq.answer: Yes, extensive travel is required for survey work.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project title at University of Allahabad?
faq.answer: “An Assessment of the ODOP Scheme and Role of Digital Entrepreneurship in Sustainable Enterprise Development in Uttar Pradesh”.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be paid for interview at University of Allahabad?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA shall be paid for appearing in the interview.
